issues.title: [MAINTENANCE] Define game-adapter, analysis, prompt, and schema evolution policy
issues.body:
## Outcome

Keep osu!mania behavior stable while preparing evidence-based future adapters.

## Scope

- Compatibility, migrations, prompt/model evaluations, new pattern taxonomy review, adapter admission criteria, deprecation, and rollback.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Future games do not weaken osu!mania contracts or non-cheat rules.
- [ ] Breaking changes include fixtures and migration tests.
- [ ] Model/prompt updates run QA baselines.
- [ ] Unsupported adapters remain disabled by default.
